title: Absorbs Energy
summary: You can harness kinetic energy and transform it into other kinds of energy.
tiers: Tier 3: Absorb Pure Energy or Improved Absorb Kinetic Energy
Tier 6: Energize Crowd or Overcharge Device
gm_intrusions: Energy goes to ground in a destructive way. Some predators feed directly on energy. An unintended item is drained of energy.
text: You can harness kinetic energy and transform it into other kinds of energy.
details: You can harness kinetic energy and transform it into other kinds of energy.
